Event: Spring Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: P37
Arboreal Sniper Pistols

The unit's attacks have a 50% chance of ignoring 30% of the target's armor.
Once in a while, the unit removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly or fear from self, and becomes immune to these effects for 4 sec. For the duration, when attacking, the unit also tears the armor of 2 enemy units with the lowest current health. When an enemy unit's armor is torn, the affected unit takes 500000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. These enemy units also receive 600000 physical damage for 4 sec. As well, the pistols' wielder also steals 15% health, damage, physical and magic armor from the targets for 4 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

Requirements: 98-100
